runTitle: v8.12.59 Release Smoke - Vercel, Cloud Run, and P17 group comparison

environment.backend: Cloud Run AI Engine v8.12.59 (revision ai-engine-00565-7mh)

coveredSurfaces: Vercel production GET /api/version - PASS version 8.12.59 and commit c017a2b7f60d348b72433f5ed327630e67940206
Cloud Run authenticated /api/ai/supervisor/health - PASS with zero LLM calls
Cloud Run free-tier guardrails - PASS maxScale 1, concurrency 16, CPU 1, memory 512Mi, cpu throttling true
P17 live regression: api vs web CPU group comparison - PASS, app/api average 33.7% vs web average 28.3%
Vercel usage check - PASS effective 17.2740 USD, billed 0.0000 USD
skippedSurfaces: Broad browser Playwright route pack - skipped because this was a post-release smoke/P17 verification and no broad UI surface changed after the prior release-facing QA
Full five-question conversational AI QA pack - skipped because the changed AI surface was the P17 group-comparison path and it was directly rechecked live
Vision live image QA - skipped by routine QA policy; no Vision routing or provider change in scope
Reporter advanced flow - skipped because no reporter prompt/routing behavior changed in v8.12.59

expertAssessments.rationale: The changed P17 AI path was exercised live against Cloud Run production and returned a grounded api/application vs web CPU comparison with both group tool calls and explicit averages.
GitLab release pipeline 2555233803 completed successfully; Vercel reports the new production deployment ready and Cloud Run reports revision ai-engine-00565-7mh with version 8.12.59.
The P17 answer preserved metric direction and compared group averages from the same 15:50 KST data slot instead of returning an empty or single-group summary.
Cloud Run health, warmup, auth health, unauth monitoring protection, and free-tier guardrails all passed after deployment.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage CLI checked current billing period after v8.12.59 production smoke; effective usage 17.2740 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed spike observed.

artifacts.label: v8.12.59 release smoke and P17 CLI evidence

completedImprovements.title: Q-NEW54/P17 api-vs-web CPU cross-group comparison returns both group averages
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.59 live Cloud Run check: application/api average CPU 33.7%, web average CPU 28.3%, conclusion app/api is 5.4%p higher; tools called getServerByGroupAdvanced twice.

notes: This run is release-facing smoke plus the changed P17 AI path. It is not intended to replace the latest broad UI baseline.
Release decision: go for the tested deployment and P17 regression scope.
